message:
feat(planner): LRU query plan cache with schema-cookie invalidation

Add a QueryPlanner struct wrapping an LRU cache (default capacity 128)
that caches compiled query plans keyed by xxh3_64 hash of SQL template
+ schema cookie, avoiding redundant join ordering and plan compilation
for repeated queries.

- cached_plan(sql_template, schema_cookie, build): returns cached
  Arc<QueryPlan> or computes via closure; flushes entire cache on
  schema cookie change (DDL invalidation)
- order_joins_with_cache(): cached wrapper around
  order_joins_with_hints_and_features() that replays
  CrackingHintStore::record_access_path() on cache hits
- Cache key: xxh3_64 hash of SQL template bytes concatenated with
  schema cookie LE bytes
- New dependencies: lru 0.16, xxhash-rust (xxh3 feature)
- Tests: cache hit matches uncached plan, schema cookie change
  invalidates all entries, LRU eviction at capacity boundary

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
